widgets.title: Customer Distribution by Country
widgets.query: SELECT Country, COUNT(CustomerId) AS CustomerCount FROM Customer GROUP BY Country

widgets.title: Top 10 Countries by Customer Count
widgets.query: SELECT Country, COUNT(CustomerId) AS CustomerCount FROM Customer GROUP BY Country ORDER BY CustomerCount DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Customer Distribution by Country (Table)
widgets.query: SELECT Country, COUNT(CustomerId) AS CustomerCount FROM Customer GROUP BY Country
